info.title: Software Producer Systems Web Services
info.summary: REST API for managing workspaces, operations and assets used by user for generating artefacts from input models
info.description: It lists the API to manage workspaces, operations and assets used by user for generating artefacts from input models

softproducersystemsUrl.description: URL of the Software Producer Service

tags.name: userspace
tags.description: APIs for managing the User Space

get.description:
Get information about the service including:  
  - Service version 
  - List of operation types

Typical API called to get service availability.

200.description: Information about service version and list of operation types

post.description:
Cleanup API:
- Delete all user workspaces (operations, assets...)
- Reset user environment

requestBody.description: List of changeable Workspaces Attributes can be provided as request body. If not provided, one Workspace with default attributes is created.

get.summary: Get the list of existing Workspaces
get.description: Get the list of existing Workspaces.

requestBody.description: List of ids of Workspaces to be deleted.
Changeable Workspace Attributes can be provided as request body. At least one attribute is required in the request body.

post.description: Extends validity of Workspace {idWs} to 30 days from current date.

get.summary: Download Workspace's contents as zip file
get.description: Download Workspace's contents as zip file.

post.description: Create and invoke new Operations in Workspace {idWs}.

requestBody.description: List of changeable Operations Attributes can be provided as request body. Attributes **type** and **objectIds** are mandatory.

get.summary: Get the list of existing Operations
get.description: Get the list of existing Operations of Workspace {idWs}.

requestBody.description: List of ids of Operations to be deleted.

get.description: Get the attributes of Operation {idOp} of Workspace {idWs}.

post.description:
Cancel Operation {idOp} of Workspace {idWs}.  
Cancel is only allowed if Operation Status is **PENDING** or **RUNNING**.

requestBody.description: List of changeable Assets Attributes can be provided as request body. If not provided, one Asset with default attributes is created.

get.operationId: Get the list of existing Assets of Workspace
get.description: Get the list of existing Assets of Workspace {idWs}.

requestBody.description: List of ids of Assets to be deleted.

get.description: Get the attributes of Asset {idAs} of Workspace {idWs}.

patch.description: Update the attributes of Asset {idAs} of Workspace {idWs}.

requestBody.description: Changeable Asset Attributes can be provided as request body. At least one attribute is required in the request body.

post.description: Upload contents for Asset {idAs} of Workspace {idWs}.

get.description: Download contents of Asset {idAs} of Workspace {idWs}.

Security.CSRF.name: X-Requested-With
Security.CSRF.description:
Required header for CSRF protection.  
Mandatory value is **Batch**.  
Another condition is that the **ORIGIN** header should not be set.

List.skip.name: skip
List.skip.description: The number of items to skip before starting to collect the result set

List.top.name: top
List.top.description: The top number of items to return

ListMessages.skip.name: skipMessages
ListMessages.skip.description: The number of Operation's messages to skip before starting to collect the result set

ListMessages.top.name: topMessages
ListMessages.top.description: The top number of Operation's messages to return

ServiceInfo.mask.name: mask
ServiceInfo.mask.description:
Mask defining what will be returned:  
- **ServiceInfo.basic** provides all attributes of Operation Types except *properties* attributes.
- **ServiceInfo.details** provides all attributes of Operation Types.

Workspaces.mask.name: mask
Workspaces.mask.description:
Mask defining what will be returned:  
- **Workspaces.basic** provides all Workspaces attributes except *properties* attributes.
- **Workspaces.details** provides all Workspaces attributes.

Workspace.mask.name: mask
Workspace.mask.description:
Mask defining what will be returned:  
- **Workspace.basic** provides all Workspace's attributes except *properties* attributes.
- **Workspace.details** provides all Workspace's attributes.

Operations.mask.name: mask
Operations.mask.description:
Mask defining what will be returned:  
- **Operations.basic** provides all Operations attributes except *properties* and *log* attributes.
- **Operations.details** provides all Operations attributes.

Operation.mask.name: mask
Operation.mask.description:
Mask defining what will be returned:  
- **Operation.basic** provides all Operation's attributes except *properties* and *log* attributes.
- **Operation.details** provides all Operation's attributes.

Assets.mask.name: mask
Assets.mask.description:
Mask defining what will be returned:  
- **Assets.basic** provides all Assets attributes except *properties* attributes.
- **Assets.details** provides all Assets attributes.

Asset.mask.name: mask
Asset.mask.description:
Mask defining what will be returned:  
- **Asset.basic** provides all Asset's attributes except *properties* attributes.
- **Asset.details** provides all Asset's attributes.

Ok.description: Code 200 - OK - Response in case of success

NoContent.description: Code 204 - No Content - Response in case of successfull delete request

BadRequest.description: Code 400 - Bad Request - Response in case of invalid request

Forbidden.description: Code 403 - Forbidden - Response in case of unauthorized access

NotFound.description: Code 404 - Not Found - Response in case of Id not found

example.message: Id of the resource does not exist

uniqueIdentifier.description: Unique Identifier of the Operation Type

name.description: Name of the Operation Type (language dependant)

nature.description: Nature of the Operation Type (middleware, applicative, zip...)

type.description: Type of the Operation Type (generation, build, validation...)

execution.description: Default Options for the Operation Type's execution

parameters.description: List of Parameters to be used while invoking Operation Type

returnCodes.description:
- List of Codes returned by Operation Type
- Common codes of operation and scanner of Operation Type

operation.description: Definition of the generation operation of Operation Type

scanner.description: Definition of the scanner operation of Operation Type

OperationTypeId.description: Unique Identifier of the Operation Type

examples: How to use the Parameter in details

flag.description: Is the Parameter a flag? Flag is a parameter without value. DefaultValue, PossibleValues and Multiplicity are not applicable in case of a Flag.

OperationTypeServiceCodes.description: Service Codes redefined to avoid collading with Operation Type's codes.

error.description: Service Code used for error invocation. Default Service Code value: -1.

cancel.description: Service Code used for cancelled invocation. Default Service Code value: -2.

OperationTypeReturnCode.description: Code returned by Operation Type following its execution

defaultMessage.description: Default message related to the code's value

examples: Code 0 is returned when Operation Type 1 is invoked with success

OperationTypeExecutable.description: Definition of the scanner or operation of Operation Type

supportedExtensions.description: List of supported extensions. If empty, all extensions are supported

supportedObjects.description: List of supported objects. If empty, all objects are supported

returnCodes.description:
- List of Codes returned by Operation Type
- Specific codes of operation or scanner of Operation Type

lastModifiedDate.description: Date of last modication of Workspace

expirationDate.description:
Expiration Date of Workspace
Workspace is deleted when the date is exceeded

producedAssets.description: - Exhaustive list of produced Assets by Operation

returnedAssets.description:
- List of Assets produced by Operation
- If Operation returns an Asset CONTAINER, its children Assets are not listed in the **returnedAssets** but listed in the **producedAssets**. Only Asset CONTAINER is part of **returnedAssets**.
- List is filled only if Operation Status is SUCCEEDED.

type.description: Reference to the Operation Type UUID

timeToLiveInMin.description: The Time To live (TTL) is the maximum duration given to an Operation to complete. After this duration, Operation' job is finished. Unit is the minute.

OperationLog.description: Log returned during invocation of Operation

OperationParameter.description: Parameter used for the invocation of the Operation

progress.description:
- Current progress of the Operation. 
- It can not exceed the maximum. 
- If progress equals maximum, Operation is complete.

OperationReturnCode.description: Code returned by Operation, depending on its Operation Type.

lastModifiedDate.description: Date of last modication of Asset

creationOperation.description: Id of Operation that created the Asset

children.description: List of Asset's children, specific to CONTAINER Asset

assetToOperationTypesIds.description: List of applicable OperationTypes on Asset

parentId.description:
- Id of parent Asset if Asset is child of another Asset.
- Parent asset must be of type CONTAINER. 
- If no parent Asset is defined, Asset is at the Workspace's root

objectsToOperationTypeIds.description: List of Asset's Objects with applicable OperationTypes
List of Asset's Objects with applicable OperationTypes

ObjectId.path.description:
An Object Id is either:
  - the **uuid** of an Asset
  - a **path** to an Object in an Asset formatted as following: "assetUuid:IdOfMyObject"
